behavior_summary: When the object/area associated with this script is examined (U8P_ENDGATE2::look action), the script emits a single short bark/text "gate ".
Immediately after emitting the bark the process suspends/terminates, so no further behavior occurs—this is an informational/examine handler without branching, flags, or external calls.
notable_control_flow: No conditionals, menus, or external interactions; the function solely reports a short description and ends.

Why the trailing space in the string "gate "; is this formatting intended or an extraction artifact? (confidence: low)
